questionHtml: The angle of the incline is slowly increased from zero. Determine the angle, in terms of the coefficient of friction, at which the hoop will begin to slip.
markschemeHtml:
Ff = μmg cos θ

m g sin ⁡ θ 2 = mg sin θ – μmg cos θ

OR

mg  sin ⁡ θ 2 = μmg cos θ

algebraic manipulation to reach tan θ = 2μ

meta.title: The angle of the incline is slowly increased from zero. Determine the angle, in terms of the coefficient of friction, at which the hoop will begin to slip.
breadcrumbLabels: B.1 – Rigid bodies and rotational dynamics
